pubmed_links: [Chen et al. (2021) Follistatin mediates learning and synaptic plasticity via regulation of Asic4 expression in the hippocampus](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34544873/)
summary: Follistatin (FST) plays a role in hippocampal neurogenesis, synaptic plasticity, spatial learning, and working memory, with brain-specific knockout mice showing LTP deficits; FSTL1, a closely related follistatin-like protein, has been implicated in schizophrenia and autism, though direct neuropsychiatric genetic evidence for FST itself remains limited. (novel candidate)
